reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Algo a mejorar es que cuando pagas con la app de YPF solo te hacen comprobante B. Soy Resp. Inscrip. y no me sirve. En otras YPF lo hacen normalmente. Es un tema del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. One thing that needs improvement is that when you pay with the YPF app, they only issue a type B receipt. I'm a registered taxpayer, and that's not enough for me. Other YPF stations usually do it. It's an issue with the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNxNmVYZ0tBEAE

reviews.comment:
Tienen todas las tarjetas, podes pagar con la aplicación, tienen para llenar aire gratis, cuando voy yo no hay cola casi. Lo malo es que no cargan GNC pero como no tengo ni me preocupo

(Translated by Google)
They accept all credit cards, you can pay with the app, they have free air refills, and when I go there's hardly any line. The downside is they don't refuel with CNG, but since I don't have any, I don't worry about it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNxc3ZYU2NREAE
